rawContent:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There is no Azure DevOps organization configured, and the git remote points to `https://github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra.git`.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need either:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL configured (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`)
2. A repository hosted on Azure DevOps

Could you provide the Azure DevOps organization URL and project/repository name where you want to query pull requests?
